chapter_title.ar: باب غُسْلِ مَنْ غَسَّلَ الْمَيِّتَ وَ مَنْ مَسَّهُ وَ هُوَ حَارٌّ وَ مَنْ مَسَّهُ وَ هُوَ بَارِدٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 31 – Washing of the one who washes the deceased, and the one who touches him while he is hot, and the one who touches him while he is cold

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/342)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/342)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَنْهَى عَنِ الْغُسْلِ إِذَا دَخَلَ الْقَبْرَ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Al Hajjal, from Sa’alba, from Ma’amar Bin Yahya who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> forbid from the washing, when entering the grave’.
en.sarwar: 5. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from al-Hajjal from Tha’labah from Mu’ammar ibn Yahya who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, Alayhi al-Salam, prohibit taking Ghusl (bath) because of entering the grave.”
